title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to install and use Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. Covers installation steps, LLM selection such as Qwen 3.5, and construction of a travel agency AI app using Python and Flask.
